responses.q1: i don't understand whats wrong with me. i don't know why i freak out sometimes. like right now i'm just laying in bed nothing is happening but i can't keep the tears running from down my face. it's stupid. i'm honestly fine nothing is wrong. why on earth am i like this?
responses.q2: let me practice what i preach if i may... this morning, and most mornings, i fought off an incredibly severe bout of anxiety as soon as i opened my eyes. the rush of adrenaline and angst was nearly overwhelming. however, i took deep breaths, caught myself, told myself everything is fine, thought of 5 things i was grateful for and one thing i was super excited about and looked forward to in the future. soon after that my anxiety was gone and my mind was on to other things. i didn't give those dreadful thoughts any attention and i didn't entertain them. i simply let them pass and subtly replaced them with positive thoughts. i hope this can help at least one person to have a better day, or even a better moment to see that there's always a light. more positive posts would help all of us don't ya think?
